issues.comment: Wrong logical operator `&&` instead of `||` in authorization check. The variable `isTeamAdminOrOwner` uses `&&` (AND) instead of `||` (OR), meaning both conditions must be true. Since `isTeamAdmin` already covers admin or owner, and `isTeamOwner` checks owner only, using `&&` collapses the check to owner-only, incorrectly denying team admins the ability to add guests. Should use `||` or just `isTeamAdmin` alone.

Unfiltered `guests` passed to `sendAddGuestsEmails` instead of `uniqueGuests`. The raw input `guests` includes emails of already-existing attendees that were filtered out during processing. This causes existing attendees to incorrectly receive `AttendeeScheduledEmail` (full booking confirmation) instead of `AttendeeAddGuestsEmail` (guest-added notification). Should pass `uniqueGuests` instead of `guests`.
